name: codex-autoresearch
description: Autonomous experiment loops for Codex: set up a benchmark, run iterations, log results, export dashboards, and finalize kept changes.

interface.shortDescription: Run autonomous benchmark loops and keep measured wins
interface.longDescription: Codex Autoresearch adapts pi-autoresearch for Codex. It provides skills and local MCP/CLI helpers for setting up measured loops, converting deep research into quality_gap benchmarks, logging keep/discard/crash results to autoresearch.jsonl, exporting a static dashboard, and splitting kept experiments into clean review branches.
defaultPrompt: Finalize kept experiments into review branches.
